metadata.description: MemInterfere Phase 5.4: Multi-step agentic workflow tasks for cascade error analysis

tasks.description: Search for the weather in London, then send an email with the forecast to the team
expected_outcomes: Email confirmation with forecast sent to team

steps.description: Search the web for current weather in London
Send an email to team@company.com with the London weather forecast

tasks.description: Look up contact info for Sarah, then create a calendar event for a meeting with her
expected_outcomes: Calendar event created for meeting with Sarah

steps.description: Look up the contact information for Sarah
Create a calendar event for a meeting with Sarah next Tuesday at 2pm
steps.expected_outcome: Calendar event created for Sarah meeting

tasks.description: Scrape pricing data from a competitor website, then save it to a file
expected_outcomes: Pricing data scraped from competitor page

steps.description: Scrape the pricing table from https://competitor.example.com/pricing using selector '.price-table'
Save the scraped pricing data to /tmp/competitor_prices.json

tasks.description: Navigate to a documentation page and summarize it

steps.description: Navigate to https://docs.example.com/api/v2 and extract the content
Summarize the documentation content

tasks.description: Read the latest emails and create a task based on the content

steps.description: Read the last 10 emails from the inbox
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of 10 emails with content

steps.description: Create a task titled 'Follow up on email thread' with medium priority

tasks.description: Get the weather forecast for New York and set a reminder about it

steps.description: Get the current weather for New York
steps.expected_outcome: JSON with temperature and conditions for New York

steps.description: Set a reminder for tomorrow morning to bring an umbrella if it will rain

tasks.description: Search for a specific web page and download a file from it
expected_outcomes: Search results showing the target page

steps.description: Search for 'Q4 financial report PDF download' on the web
steps.expected_outcome: Search results with URLs to the report

steps.description: Download the financial report PDF from the top search result URL

tasks.description: Check the website status and take a screenshot if it's down
expected_outcomes: Screenshot taken of the error page

steps.description: Check if https://api.example.com is up and responding
Take a screenshot of https://api.example.com to document the error
steps.expected_outcome: PNG image path of the screenshot

tasks.description: Query the database for monthly sales and calculate the total

steps.description: Query the database for all sales records from last month
Calculate the total of the sales amounts from the query results

tasks.description: Look up stock price for AAPL and send the result to a colleague
expected_outcomes: Stock price data for AAPL retrieved

steps.description: Get the current stock price for AAPL
Send an email to colleague@company.com with the AAPL stock price
steps.expected_outcome: Email sent with stock price information

tasks.description: Search for product reviews, scrape the top result, and summarize the findings
expected_outcomes: Review data scraped from top result

steps.description: Search the web for 'best wireless headphones reviews 2026'
steps.expected_outcome: List of search results with review URLs

steps.description: Scrape the review data from the top search result using selector '.review-content'
Summarize the scraped review content into key findings

tasks.description: Read emails about meeting invites, create calendar events, and set reminders
expected_outcomes: Calendar event created for each meeting
Reminders set 15 minutes before each meeting

steps.description: Read all unread emails from today and identify meeting invites
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of emails with meeting details

steps.description: Create a calendar event for each meeting invite found
Set a reminder 15 minutes before each meeting

tasks.description: Monitor a page for changes, extract the changed data, and save it to a file
expected_outcomes: Changes detected on the monitored page

steps.description: Monitor https://status.example.com for changes since yesterday
Extract the table data from the changed sections
Save the extracted table data to /tmp/status_changes.json

tasks.description: Look up a contact, get weather for their city, and send them a weather update email
expected_outcomes: Contact info retrieved for the person

steps.description: Look up contact information for Alice Johnson
steps.expected_outcome: Alice's contact info including city and email

steps.description: Get the current weather for Alice's city
Send Alice an email with the weather update for her city
steps.expected_outcome: Email sent to Alice with weather info

tasks.description: Navigate to a product page, extract the price table, and download the product datasheet
expected_outcomes: Price table extracted as structured data

steps.description: Navigate to https://shop.example.com/products/widget-pro
Extract the pricing table from the product page
Download the product datasheet PDF from the product page
steps.expected_outcome: PDF file downloaded to local storage

tasks.description: Query the database for quarterly revenue, write results to a file, and email the report
expected_outcomes: Results saved to a CSV file

steps.description: Query the database for all revenue records from Q1 2026
Write the query results to /tmp/q1_revenue.csv
Email the revenue report file to finance@company.com
steps.expected_outcome: Email sent with revenue report attached

tasks.description: Search for news about AI regulation, summarize the top article, and create a task to follow up
expected_outcomes: News articles about AI regulation found
Task created to follow up on regulation

steps.description: Search for recent news about 'AI regulation policy 2026'
Navigate to the top article and summarize it
steps.expected_outcome: Concise summary of the AI regulation article

steps.description: Create a task to follow up on the regulation changes
steps.expected_outcome: Task created with regulation follow-up details

tasks.description: Get weather for 3 cities, calculate average temperature, and write a report

steps.description: Get the current weather for New York, London, and Tokyo
steps.expected_outcome: Weather data including temperatures for 3 cities

steps.description: Calculate the average temperature across the three cities
Write the weather report with average temperature to /tmp/weather_report.txt

tasks.description: Search for a specific product, scrape the specifications, and fill out a comparison form

steps.description: Search for 'Samsung Galaxy S26 specs'
steps.expected_outcome: Search results with product page URLs

steps.description: Scrape the specification data from the top product result
Fill out the comparison form at https://compare.example.com with the scraped specs

tasks.description: Read a data file, query the database to enrich it, and email the merged results

steps.description: Read the customer list from /tmp/customers.csv
Query the database for purchase history matching the customer IDs
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of customer purchase records

steps.description: Email the merged customer report to sales@company.com
steps.expected_outcome: Email sent with enriched customer data

tasks.description: Search for competitor pricing, scrape 3 product pages, extract tables, and create a comparison report
expected_outcomes: Pricing data scraped from each page

steps.description: Search for 'widget pricing comparison 2026'
Navigate to the top competitor pricing page
Scrape the pricing data using selector '.price-list'
Extract the comparison table from the scraped data
Save the comparison report to /tmp/pricing_comparison.json

tasks.description: Read emails, identify meeting invites, create events, set reminders, and send confirmation

steps.description: Read all unread emails and identify meeting invites
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of meeting invite emails

steps.description: Create calendar events for each identified meeting invite
Set reminders 30 minutes before each meeting
Send confirmation emails to meeting organizers

tasks.description: Get weather for outdoor event location, look up attendee contacts, create the event, and send invitations
expected_outcomes: Calendar event created with weather note
Invitation emails sent with weather info

steps.description: Get the weather forecast for the outdoor event location (Central Park, New York)
steps.expected_outcome: Weather forecast data for Central Park area

steps.description: Look up contact information for all team members attending the event
Create an outdoor team event in the calendar for the best weather day, with a weather note
steps.expected_outcome: Calendar event created with weather-aware details

steps.description: Send invitation emails to all attendees with the weather forecast included
steps.expected_outcome: Invitation emails sent to all attendees

tasks.description: Search for product pages, navigate to them, extract images, and download the product catalog

steps.description: Search for 'acme widget pro official page'
steps.expected_outcome: Search results with product page URLs

steps.description: Navigate to the official product page from search results
Extract all product images from the page
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of image URLs and alt text

steps.description: Download the product catalog PDF from the page

tasks.description: Query the database for revenue data, calculate totals, write a report, and create a task for review

steps.description: Query the database for this quarter's revenue by region
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of revenue records by region

steps.description: Calculate the total revenue and percentage change from last quarter
steps.expected_outcome: JSON with calculated totals and percentages

steps.description: Write the revenue report to /tmp/q_revenue_report.txt
Create a task for the finance analyst to review the report

tasks.description: Crawl a documentation site, extract metadata, download the API reference, and summarize it

steps.description: Crawl https://docs.example.com for all pages about authentication
Extract metadata from the crawled authentication pages
steps.expected_outcome: JSON with page titles, descriptions, and tags

steps.description: Download the main API reference PDF from the documentation site
Summarize the key authentication concepts from the downloaded reference

tasks.description: Search for news, read the RSS feed, summarize articles, and email a digest to the team

steps.description: Search for recent news about 'data privacy regulation'
Read the RSS feed from https://news.example.com/tech/feed.xml for related articles
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of RSS entries with article URLs

steps.description: Summarize the top 3 articles from the RSS feed
steps.expected_outcome: Concise summaries of the top 3 articles

steps.description: Send a news digest email to team@company.com with the summaries

tasks.description: Monitor competitor pages for price changes, extract the new prices, calculate differences, and alert the team
expected_outcomes: Price changes detected on competitor pages

steps.description: Monitor https://competitor.example.com/pricing for changes since last week
Extract the pricing table from the competitor page
steps.expected_outcome: Structured pricing data as JSON list

steps.description: Calculate the percentage price change for each product
Send a price change alert email to pricing@company.com
steps.expected_outcome: Price alert email sent with calculations

tasks.description: Read emails about project updates, query the database for related data, write a summary report, and set a reminder
expected_outcomes: Related project data queried from database

steps.description: Read emails from this week about project updates
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of project update emails

steps.description: Query the database for project milestones mentioned in the emails
steps.expected_outcome: JSON list of project milestone data

steps.description: Write a summary report combining email updates and database data to /tmp/project_summary.txt
Set a reminder to follow up on the project next Monday at 9am

tasks.description: Search for a location, get the weather, check website status, navigate to the page, and fill out an event form
expected_outcomes: Weather forecast for the venue location

steps.description: Search for 'Central Park outdoor concert venue NYC'
Get the weather forecast for the venue location
steps.expected_outcome: Weather data for the venue area

steps.description: Check if the venue website is up and accessible
Navigate to the event registration page
Fill out the event registration form with name, email, and preferred date
